scripts.serve: npm run build && bash ./scripts/run-with-node20.sh firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore,auth
scripts.test:emulators: npm run build && bash ./scripts/run-with-node20.sh firebase emulators:exec --project demo-boatface --config ../firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions "node --test test/emulator.integration.test.mjs"
